title: Classic British Trifle
description: A traditional English dessert made with layers of sponge cake, fruit, custard, and toffee. Each bite is a delightful combination of textures and flavors.
instructions: Cut the sponge cake into 1-inch cubes.
In a large serving dish, create a layer of sponge cake cubes.
Top the cake layer with a layer of mixed berries.
Drizzle the toffee sauce over the berries.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of sponge cake on top.
Pour the aerated custard over the top layer of cake.
Chill the trifle in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
Just before serving, top the trifle with whipped cream and garnish with popcorn.
